howItWorksLines: Click a gift to see full details
Shipping details are sent by email during checkout

middle.outsideBudgetBlurb: A little beyond your set range — but these are picks we’d especially love.

right.checkoutIntro: Choose one path below. This page records your intent-to-gift and sends shipping details by email. (No real payment happens on-site.)
whatToExpectLines: You'll enter your name, email, and a short message for the gift card.
Your selection becomes 'Claim pending confirmation' until the couple confirms receipt.
Shipping details are emailed during the flow.
right.pendingBlockLine: This gift is currently pending confirmation.
right.claimSuccessMessage: Thank you! Your intent-to-gift has been recorded.
right.shippingBlockNote: Hannah's mom is collecting gifts at her home and bringing them to us at the wedding.

overlay.title: Gifting details
overlay.giftMessage: Your note + transaction detail (which app you used, approx amount, or a receipt reference if shipping)
overlay.shippingNote: If you're shipping a physical gift, the address is shown above the form on the gift's detail page.
rightPaneLines: Tell us how you sent or arranged the gift — payment app + amount, or a receipt reference if shipping.
We'll mark the gift Claimed once we confirm receipt.
If we don't hear from you, we'll send a friendly reminder by email.
